title: Red Any% Runner
purpose: A speedrun racer twin that routes a classic monster-RPG from start to Hall of Fame (any%). ROM-FREE: the runner supplies their own legal ROM; this snapshot carries only the route, splits, and input logic — no game data.

awaken.brainstem: summon public bones from raw + private local, ignite with soul LLM
awaken.dog_god: public bones travel; private stays on device
